style_prompt: Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.
image_prompt: An editorial cover illustration on warm cream paper, deep Alberta navy line work with small rust-coloured accents. Three simple gauge dials sit in a row, their needles leaning upward to suggest measurement and progress, with fine tick marks around each dial. Calm, archival, abstract. Wide cover aspect. No text, no logos, no people.
